entries.source: "Balance school and exam prep"
entries.value: "School en eksamenvoorbereiding balanseer"

entries.source: "Create a daily English routine"
entries.value: "Maak 'n dagelijkse roetine vir Engels"

entries.source: "Plan my week for math"
entries.value: "Plan my week vir wiskunde"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Study Plan Builder on inspir for planning learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: 'n praktiese gids vir die gebruik van Study Plan Builder op inspir vir leer rondom beplanning, met prompts, studielusse en veiliger AI-gewoontes.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: 'n sterker studielus

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Pas die sessie aan jou doel aan.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI-tutor

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Vra om 'n klein eerste stap in plaas van 'n definitief antwoord.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Vra die AI om jy redenasie te kontroleer, nie net wat resultaat.

entries.source: Build a routine that survives real life.
entries.value: Bou 'n roetine wat die regte lewe aankan.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Sluit af deur die idee uit wat geheugen terug te skryf.

entries.source: Learners exploring planning topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Leerders wat beplanningsonderwerpe verken en praktiese leiding wil hê in plaas van 'n generiese antwoordblokkie.

entries.source: Planning
entries.value: Beplanning

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts om te probeer

entries.source: Start the live mode at Study Plan Builder. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Habit Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Begin die lewendig modus by Study Plan Builder. Wil jy 'n verwante leervorm, probeer dan Habit Coach. Vir 'n breer beeld van die platform lees jy wat 'n AI-leermaat vir almal sou moet doen.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Begin met voorbeeldprompts.

entries.source: Study Plan Builder
entries.value: Studieplanbouer

entries.source: Study Plan Builder AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Create a study plan around your time, energy, goals, and weak spots.
entries.value: Study Plan Builder AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: Maak 'n studieplan rondom jy tijd, energie, doelwitte en swak plekken.

entries.source: Study Plan Builder AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Study Plan Builder AI Learning Mode: praktiese gids

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Vertel die modus wat jy probeert te leer of te maak.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Dat verschil zie jy in die flow. In plek van een enorme reaksie bewegen die beste sessies deur 'n lus: stel 'n doel, probeer iets, krijg terugvoer, herstel die swak plek en kies die volgende aksie.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Die focus is belangrik. 'n algemene chatbot kan byna alles beantwoorde, maar 'n leermodus geeft wat gesprek vorm. Die stuurt jy na wat soort dink, oefen, terugvoer of verkennen waardoor die idee bly hangen.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hierdie is dieselfde gewoonte agter studeren met AI sonder jezelf te besluitdriegen: hou die leerder aktief. AI is wat nuttigst wanneer wat terugvoer geeft op jy dink.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Hierdie modus is vooral nuttig vir leerders wat wil:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for study plan builder with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Hierdie modus is afgestem op study plan builder, met eie prompts, voorbeelde en leervloei.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Probeer die stap in jy eie woorde.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gebruik Study Plan Builder wanneer jy 'n sessie wil wat vinnig begin maar homself toch aan jou aanpas. Die eerste doel is nie om indrukwekkend te kskakel. Die eerste doel is om die volgende stap haalbaar te laat voel.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Waar hierdie modus by help

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Waar jy hierna natoe kan

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Jy kan ook begin met 'n ruwe versie van jou regte probleem. 'n rommelige eerste prompt is prima. Die sessie kan wat vlak, die teikengroep, sperdatum en styl verduideliken zodra jy begint.
